# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  adminUsername:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Username for the Virtual Machine.
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: Password for the Virtual Machine.
  vmNamePrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: devvm
    metadata:
      description: Prefix for the VM names. VMs will be named devvm0, devvm1, etc.
  instanceCount:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 2
    minValue: 1
    maxValue: 5
    metadata:
      description: The number of VM instances to create.
  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard_DS1_v2
    metadata:
      description: Size of the Virtual Machine.
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources.

variables:
  vnetName: "devVNet"
  subnetName: "default"
  publicIPAddressNamePrefix: "devPublicIP"
  networkInterfaceNamePrefix: "devNIC"
  networkSecurityGroupName: "devNSG"
  addressPrefix: "10.0.0.0/16"
  subnetPrefix: "10.0.0.0/24"
  osDiskType: "Standard_LRS"
  imagePublisher: "MicrosoftWindowsServer"
  imageOffer: "WindowsServer"
  imageSku: "2019-Datacenter"
  imageVersion: "latest"

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: "2020-11-01"
    name: "[variables('vnetName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - "[variables('addressPrefix')]"
      subnets:
        - name: "[variables('subnetName')]"
          properties:
            addressPrefix: "[variables('subnetPrefix')]"
            networkSecurityGroup:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('networkSecurityGroupName'))]"

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: "2020-11-01"
    name: "[variables('networkSecurityGroupName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: "SSH"
          properties:
            priority: 1000
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "22"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        - name: "RDP"
          properties:
            priority: 1001
            direction: "Inbound"
            access: "Allow"
            protocol: "Tcp"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationPortRange: "3389"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"

  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    apiVersion: "2020-11-01"
    name: "[format('{0}{1}', variables('publicIPAddressNamePrefix'), copyIndex())]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Basic"
      tier: "Regional"
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"
      idleTimeoutInMinutes: 4
    copy:
      name: "publicIPLoop"
      count: "[parameters('instanceCount')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: "2020-11-01"
    name: "[format('{0}{1}', variables('networkInterfaceNamePrefix'), copyIndex())]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', variables('vnetName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', format('{0}{1}', variables('publicIPAddressNamePrefix'), copyIndex()))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('networkSecurityGroupName'))]"
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: "ipconfig1"
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: "Dynamic"
            publicIPAddress:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', format('{0}{1}', variables('publicIPAddressNamePrefix'), copyIndex()))]"
            subnet:
              id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', variables('vnetName'), variables('subnetName'))]"
    copy:
      name: "nicLoop"
      count: "[parameters('instanceCount')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: "2020-12-01"
    name: "[format('{0}{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex())]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', format('{0}{1}', variables('networkInterfaceNamePrefix'), copyIndex()))]"
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: "[parameters('vmSize')]"
      osProfile:
        computerName: "[format('{0}{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex())]"
        adminUsername: "[parameters('adminUsername')]"
        adminPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: "[variables('imagePublisher')]"
          offer: "[variables('imageOffer')]"
          sku: "[variables('imageSku')]"
          version: "[variables('imageVersion')]"
        osDisk:
          createOption: "FromImage"
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: "[variables('osDiskType')]"
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', format('{0}{1}', variables('networkInterfaceNamePrefix'), copyIndex()))]"
      diagnosticsProfile:
        bootDiagnostics:
          enabled: true
          storageUri: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName')), '2019-06-01').primaryEndpoints.blob]"
    copy:
      name: "vmLoop"
      count: "[parameters('instanceCount')]"
      
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: "2019-06-01"
    name: "[format('bootdiag{0}', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Standard_LRS"
    kind: "StorageV2"
    properties:
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
    # This storage account is for boot diagnostics; can be removed if not needed.
    # It must be created outside the VM loop as it's a single resource referenced by all VMs.

outputs:
  vmPublicIPs:
    type: array
    value: "[range(0, parameters('instanceCount'))]"
    copy:
      name: publicIPsOutputLoop
      count: "[parameters('instanceCount')]"
      input: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', format('{0}{1}', variables('publicIPAddressNamePrefix'), copyIndex())), '2020-11-01').ipAddress]"
